title: Instantons Through EML — Taming the Vacuum

analysis.object: T809: Instantons Through EML — Taming the Vacuum depth analysis

instanton_solution.description: F = *F: self-dual connection -- EML-3 oscillatory solution

instanton_charge.description: Topological charge Q = (1/8pi^2) int Tr(F^F): Q in Z -- EML-0

instanton_action.description: Action S = 8pi^2|Q|/g^2: proportional to Q -- EML-2 linear in Q

instanton_moduli.description: Moduli space M_k of charge-k instantons: smooth manifold of dim 8k-3 -- EML-2

instanton_gas.description: Dilute instanton gas: sum over Q with weight exp(-8pi^2|Q|/g^2) -- EML-1 series

theta_vacuum.description: Full theta-vacuum: |theta> = sum_Q e^{iQtheta} |Q> -- EML-3 superposition

t809_theorem.description: T809: Instanton charge = EML-0. Moduli space = EML-2. Theta-vacuum = EML-3. Instanton gas = EML-1. The instanton vacuum is a {0,1,2,3} structure -- ALL EML-finite! The EML-inf comes from the PATH INTEGRAL MEASURE over moduli space. T809.
t809_theorem.reason: Critical finding: instantons themselves are EML-finite; the measure is EML-inf

analysis.theorem: T809: Instantons Through EML — Taming the Vacuum (S1088).

key_theorem: T809: Instantons Through EML — Taming the Vacuum (S1088).
